name: vscode-maproom
description: Semantic code search powered by Maproom - find code by concept, not just text

maproom.database.provider.markdownDescription:
Database backend for code search index.

**SQLite (recommended)**: Zero-config local file. Works immediately with existing `~/.maproom/maproom.db`.

**PostgreSQL**: Full-featured with Docker. Required for team sharing and advanced features.
enumDescriptions: Local SQLite file (zero-config, recommended for most users)
PostgreSQL via Docker (advanced, enables team sharing)

maproom.database.sqlitePath.markdownDescription: Path to SQLite database file. Leave empty for default (`~/.maproom/maproom.db`). Supports tilde (`~`) for home directory. Only used when provider is `sqlite`.

maproom.database.host.markdownDescription: PostgreSQL host. Use `localhost` when running outside containers, `maproom-postgres` when inside Docker network. Only used when provider is `postgres`.

maproom.database.port.markdownDescription: PostgreSQL port. Only used when provider is `postgres`.

maproom.database.user.markdownDescription: PostgreSQL username. Only used when provider is `postgres`.

maproom.database.password.markdownDescription: PostgreSQL password. Only used when provider is `postgres`.

maproom.database.name.markdownDescription: PostgreSQL database name. Only used when provider is `postgres`.

scripts.prepackage: pnpm run prepare:binaries && pnpm run compile
